source: Real inbox sample (Gmail thread 19e484998dfc1756, 2026-05-21), Amazon Fire TV upgrade announcement from store-news@amazon.com

input.subject: An upgrade for your Fire TV is coming soon
input.bodyTruncated: Alexa+ brings all-new helpful features. Your Fire TV is getting smarter with Alexa+. Coming soon to your device. Learn more about the new features, including improved voice control, smart-home integration, and personalized content recommendations. No action needed from you — the upgrade will arrive automatically.

notes: Pure marketing announcement — no event, no date, no time. Extractor MUST return either no event or very low confidence. Tests false-positive resistance on a high-volume promotional category (Amazon emails dominate the inbox).
